allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Not ready yet: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\): OK" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\fukat\\suntory-app" -Depth 2 | Where-Object { $_.Name -notmatch "node_modules|\\.next|\\.git" } | Select-Object FullName, PSIsContainer | Format-Table -AutoSize)
